headline: Private Equity’s Push for Small Investors Is ‘Scandalous,’ Says Value Maven Chris Davis
summary: The value maven decried high fees, high leverage, and dangerous lockups. Plus, why he likes Capital One, Chubb, and Tyson.

headline: As March Madness unfolds, NY Fed highlights sports betting toll on consumer credit health
summary: As sports gambling becomes more popular and less restricted, consumer credit health is suffering, according to a new report by the New York Fed.

headline: 'Most People Don't Enjoy Their Jobs:' Perplexity CEO Says AI Layoffs Are Chance To Launch AI-Powered Ventures
summary: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas calls AI layoffs an opportunity, urging workers to embrace entrepreneurship and reinvent careers amid job displacement.

headline: Analysts Reaffirm Buy as Capital One Financial Corporation (COF) Normalizes Credit
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is one of the best cheapest stocks to buy on Robinhood. On March 16, Jefferies analyst John Hecht reaffirmed a Buy rating and a $300 price target on Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF). Hecht took the decision after reviewing Capital One’s February credit card performance data. The data told a […]
